sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65690" key="meida/mwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μειδ-άμων</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾱ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n65690.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">smiling,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hymn.Is.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">147</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
